debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
L : Type u_2
inst✝³ : Field K
inst✝² : Field L
inst✝¹ : Algebra K L
inst✝ : Finite K
⊢ IsCyclotomicExtension {n | ↑n ≠ 0} K L ↔ IsAlgClosure K L

failed_attempts:
let q := Fintype.card K
    let d := f.natDegree
    have hd : d ≠ 0 := fun h ↦ by simp [h] at hf; exact Polynomial.not_irreducible_C _ hf
    let n := q ^ d - 1
    have hn : n ∈ S := by
      rw [hS]
      intro h
      have : ringChar K ∣ q ^ d := dvd_trans (CharP.char_dvd_card K (ringChar K)) (dvd_pow_self _ hd)
      have : ringChar K ∣ 1 := by
        convert Nat.dvd_sub' this h
        rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (Fintype.one_lt_card (α := K)))]
      exact Nat.Prime.not_dvd_one (CharP.char_is_prime K L) this
    have h_split : Polynomial.Splits (algebraMap K L) (Polynomial.X ^ n - 1) :=
      IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one K L hn
    have h_div : f ∣ Polynomial.X ^ (q ^ d) - Polynomial.X :=
      Polynomial.dvd_X_pow_card_pow_sub_X hf
    rw [show Polynomial.X ^ (q ^ d) - Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X * (Polynomial.X ^ n - 1) by
      rw [mul_sub, mul_one, ← pow_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (Fintype.one_lt_card (α := K)))]] at h_div
    rcases Polynomial.isUnit_or_dvd_of_dvd_mul_of_irreducible hf h_div with h | h
    · exact Polynomial.Splits.of_degree_le_one _ (Polynomial.degree_le_one_of_isUnit_right h)
    · exact Polynomial.Splits.of_dvd _ h h_split
  · rw [IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_adjoin_roots]
    intro x
    by_cases hx : x = 0; · rw [hx]; exact Subalgebra.zero_mem _
    have : IsAlgebraic K x := IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K L x
    let F := IntermediateField.adjoin K {x}
    have : Finite F := FiniteDimensional.finite_of_finite K F
    let q := Fintype.card F
    have hqn : q - 1 ∈ S := by
      rw [hS]
      intro h
      have : ringChar K ∣ q := by
        rw [CharP.ringChar_eq K F]
        exact CharP.char_dvd_card F (ringChar F)
      have : ringChar K ∣ 1 := by
        convert Nat.dvd_sub' this h
        exact (Nat.sub_add_cancel (Fintype.one_lt_card (α := F) |>.le)).symm
      exact Nat.Prime.not_dvd_one (CharP.char_is_prime K L) this
    refine Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨q - 1, hqn, ?_⟩
    exact FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one x hx
